_meta.rules: NEVER remove or edit existing features. Only update 'passes' after running the truth gate. Add new features at the end.

features.description: runner.py starts without errors in shadow mode
steps: Run python runner.py --shadow (or equivalent shadow flag)
Verify no import errors or crashes
Verify it enters the main loop

features.description: All strategy modules import cleanly without errors
steps: Verify each strategy in strategies/ can be imported

features.description: Polymarket venue connector handles API responses correctly
steps: Verify error handling for bad responses
Verify mock/shadow mode doesn't hit real endpoints

features.description: run-micro-live.sh executes a micro trading loop successfully
Ralph automation configs are valid and parseable
steps: Verify config files parse without errors
Verify automation rules match expected behavior
